completed_slice: Defined and verified a deny-by-default machine-readable contract for the Cloudflare deployment environment and credential capabilities.
verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed and the canonical requirements document returned ok=true in an isolated runtime.

completion_gate: Cloudflare control-plane metadata binds the project, exact commit, and URL

next_action: Wire the environment contract validator into the Cloudflare deployment workflow, then dispatch only after the external environment is configured.
